steps.name: project-and-types
steps.summary: pyproject.toml, Makefile, directory skeleton, core types (RiskTier/ProductManifest/RiskProfile/Finding/RiskReport/GateDecision), config parsers with JSON Schema validation, fixture YAMLs, 18 tests passing

steps.name: controls-repo
steps.summary: 12 OSCAL controls (PCI-DSS 5, ASVS 4, FISC 3), tier-mappings.yaml, ControlsRepository class, select_baseline function, Control/VerificationMethod models, 14 new tests (32 total passing)

steps.name: scanner-integration
steps.summary: Scanner Protocol, ControlMapper (verification_methods→Control ID), 4 scanner wrappers (Checkov/Semgrep/Grype/Gitleaks), ScannerRunner with log-and-continue failure policy, 4 fixture files, 27 new tests (59 total passing)

steps.name: gate-engine
steps.summary: ThresholdEvaluator (deterministic, no AI, 100% local), GateDecision with threshold_results list, 8 new tests (67 total passing)

steps.name: risk-scoring
steps.summary: RiskAssessor Protocol, compute_risk_score (SP 800-30 Likelihood×Impact), StaticRiskAssessor (deterministic categorize+assess), RA-YYYY-MMDD-NNN report IDs, mypy type fixes, 13 new tests (80 total passing)

steps.name: bedrock-assessor
steps.summary: BedrockRiskAssessor (Strategy pattern, Bedrock InvokeModel API), BedrockClient wrapper, prompt templates (categorization+assessment), StaticRiskAssessor fallback on failure/invalid JSON, deterministic score preserved (AI cannot override), 9 new unit tests + 3 prompt tests + 2 contract tests (91 unit + 2 contract total passing)
